name: Kirsch-Schnitzel (Veal Cutlets with Cherry Sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pat the cutlets dry with paper towels.
2. Heat oil in a frypan and brown the cutlets on each side for approximately 3 minutes.
3. Season with salt and pepper.
4. Remove the cutlets from the pan and keep them warm.
5. In a separate pan, blend wine and evaporated milk and simmer for 3 minutes.
6. Add cherries; heat through and adjust seasonings.
7. Return the cutlets to the sauce and reheat gently.
8. Arrange the cutlets on a preheated platter, pouring cherry sauce around them.
9. Garnish with parsley.
